lane.title: 02 Google Ads
lane.last_task: Close COA Google Ads 4 AM report flow explanation
lane.last_summary: Explained the daily Google Ads PDF report flow in simple terms: 4 AM reads the 23:00-02:00 window, verifies spend/radius/schedule/search-only configuration, classifies actual search intent, reads landing actions, interprets what happened, and outputs one next-day decision. Existing COA report spec, visual HTML wireframe, and sample PDF remain saved under _context/Google_Ads_Daily_Report_2026-05-25.
lane.next_action: Build the automated report generator that fills the defined PDF with live Google Ads metrics and landing action events, then wire WABA delivery only after the PDF link/attachment path is confirmed.
lane.mutation_status: No live ad/WABA/GBP/POS/Odoo/Cloudflare mutation; memory sync only.

recent_events.task: Define COA Google Ads 4 AM PDF report layout

recent_events.task: Rotate Claude API key for future Ads report reasoning
recent_events.summary: Saved one canonical ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in ~/.hn-assets.env for Claude/Anthropic API use and removed the two stale Anthropic key exports from the file. Did not print the key. File permissions remain 600. Live API call was not retried successfully because this environment previously had DNS/connectivity failures to api.anthropic.com.
recent_events.next_action: Use ANTHROPIC_API_KEY as the only Claude API env var when building the 4 AM Google Ads report analysis layer; keep WABA/template/report automation gated until explicitly approved after landing bridge data arrives.
recent_events.mutation_status: Local secret rotation only; no Google Ads, Meta, WABA send/template, GBP, POS, Odoo, or Cloudflare production mutation.

recent_events.task: Bridge Google late-night landing to WABA voucher secondary CTA
recent_events.summary: Verified live Google Ads/cockpit state before mutation: Hamza v2 23877692297 and Dish 2km 23882183242 remain enabled Search campaigns at Rs250/day each, presence-only 5km/2km, 23:00-02:00; old Rs195.87/6-click spend remains attributed to paused generic Late Night v1. Verified landing variants and WABA voucher trigger text in deployed WhatsApp flow. Deployed safe landing-only bridge: primary CTA remains Get Directions To Hamza Express, secondary WhatsApp CTA is now Get WhatsApp Voucher Before You Come with exact prefill 'Hi Hamza, send my WhatsApp voucher'. Updated landing tracker allow-list so pageview/maps/call/menu/whatsapp_voucher preserve he_brand_late_night_5km vs he_dish_late_night_2km. No Google Ads, Meta, WABA send/template, GBP, POS, or Odoo mutation.
recent_events.next_action: After first complete 23:00-02:00 window, inspect Google search terms and landing event split by campaign: maps/call/menu/whatsapp_voucher. Keep Maps as primary unless voucher clicks add capture without hurting directions.
recent_events.mutation_status: Cloudflare Pages landing/tracking mutation only: functions/go/google-night.js and functions/api/google-ads-landing-event.js deployed to hamzaexpress.in via Pages preview c05a7a1a. Google Ads money state unchanged.

recent_events.task: Update Hamza Express Google cockpit for live two-campaign late-night split
recent_events.summary: Deployed /ops/google-cockpit/ update so the cockpit now reflects the active Google Ads state: Hamza Hotel Late Night Brand Capture v2 at 5km Rs250/day plus Dish Late Night 2km Search v1 at Rs250/day, both 11 PM-2 AM; removed stale PMax/7km/dinner-facing cockpit wording and verified production HTML.
recent_events.next_action: Monitor first 11 PM-2 AM delivery for the two enabled campaigns: Hamza v2 should capture Hamza Hotel intent in 5km, Dish v1 should capture biryani/ghee rice/kabab/open-now intent in 2km; watch Dish ad review status and first search terms.
recent_events.mutation_status: Cloudflare Pages production UI mutation only; no additional Google Ads money mutation in this step; previous live Google Ads state remains two enabled Search campaigns at Rs250/day each.

recent_events.task: Deep audit split late-night Google Ads campaigns
recent_events.summary: Audited live Hamza intent campaign 23877692297 and 2km dish campaign 23882183242 down to budget, network settings, geo mode, criteria, ad groups, keywords, ads, review status, search terms, landing alignment, and prior-leak guardrails. Found no budget/radius/schedule/network error. Corrected one conversion-risk issue: dish campaign landing now switches to dish-specific copy via utm_campaign instead of saying 'Searched Hamza Hotel'. Added exact negatives to dish campaign for previous generic leak terms: restaurants near me, restaurant near me, food near me, food near me open now, restaurants open now near me, open restaurant near me, food places near me open now. Dish ads remain under Google review; Hamza ads approved. Saved audit at _context/Google_Ads_Hamza_Brand_2026-05-25/12-deep-audit-and-self-learning-2026-05-25.md.
recent_events.next_action: Before tonight's 23:00 window, recheck dish campaign ad review status. After the full 23:00-02:00 window, inspect search terms: Hamza campaign must stay Hamza/Hamza Hotel/Hamza Express; dish campaign must stay biryani/kabab/ghee rice/non-veg/open-now/Shivajinagar. If generic terms recur, remove broader restaurant keywords before increasing budget.
recent_events.mutation_status: LIVE correction after audit: Cloudflare Pages updated for campaign-specific landing copy; Google Ads dish campaign 23882183242 received 7 exact negative keywords blocking prior generic leakage. No budget/radius/schedule changes beyond prior split.

recent_events.task: Split late-night Search budget into Hamza intent and 2km dish intent
recent_events.summary: Changed active Hamza Hotel late-night campaign 23877692297 to Rs250/day and 23:00-02:00. Deployed Ads control endpoint support for budget/schedule changes. Created and enabled HE — Dish Late Night 2km Search — v1 campaign 23882183242 at Rs250/day, 2km presence-only radius, 23:00-02:00 schedule, 28 exact/phrase dish/open-now/Shivajinagar late-night keywords, direct /go/google-night landing, shared negatives attached. Final active Search budget is Rs500/day split Rs250 + Rs250; old Brand v1, Late Night v1, Dinner v1, and PMax remain paused. Saved execution record to _context/Google_Ads_Hamza_Brand_2026-05-25/11-live-split-budget-dish-2km-execution.md.
recent_events.next_action: After the next complete 23:00-02:00 window, compare search terms by campaign: Hamza intent must stay Hamza/Hamza Hotel/Hamza Express, dish campaign must stay biryani/kabab/ghee rice/non-veg/open-now/Shivajinagar; inspect landing direction/call/menu actions and outlet counter feedback.
recent_events.mutation_status: LIVE Google Ads money mutation completed: campaign 23877692297 ENABLED Rs250/day 5km 23:00-02:00; campaign 23882183242 CREATED+ENABLED Rs250/day 2km 23:00-02:00; prior campaigns 23845870050, 23854158442, 23855561197 and 23834053403 PAUSED; Cloudflare Pages production updated for Ads control endpoint.

recent_events.task: Create and enable Hamza Hotel late-night brand campaign
recent_events.summary: Deployed Hamza Express Ads endpoint and /go/google-night landing; created HE — Hamza Hotel Late Night Brand Capture — v2 campaign 23877692297 at Rs500/day, 5km presence-only radius, 22:00-03:00 schedule, Hamza Hotel/Express keywords, craving-first copy with 10% dine-in; enabled v2 and paused old Brand v1, generic Late Night v1, Dinner v1, with PMax remaining paused. Saved execution record to _context/Google_Ads_Hamza_Brand_2026-05-25/10-live-execution-record.md.
recent_events.next_action: Monitor next full 22:00-03:00 window: search terms must stay Hamza/Hamza Express intent, compare landing pageview-to-directions/call/menu actions, and ask outlet if late-night customers mention Google/Hamza Express.
recent_events.mutation_status: LIVE Google Ads money mutation completed: campaign 23877692297 ENABLED at Rs500/day; campaigns 23845870050, 23854158442, 23855561197 PAUSED; 23834053403 remains PAUSED; Cloudflare Pages production updated for Ads endpoint and landing page.

recent_events.task: Define Hamza brand vs competitor conquest targeting structure
recent_events.summary: Recommended separating Hamza Hotel brand capture from competitor conquest. Hamza Hotel/Express searches should run active at 5km because intent is warm and connected to Hamza memory. Competitor terms such as Empire Central Street, Imperial Restaurant, Taj Shivajinagar, New Hilal, and New North Indian should be a separate 2km conquest test, preferably paused or low-budget, using competitor names only as exact/phrase keywords and not in ad copy to avoid trademark/misleading ad risk. Visible ad should remain Hamza Express craving/late-night/offer focused.
recent_events.next_action: If owner approves conquest layer, build separate paused 2km competitor Search campaign/ad groups and keep primary Rs500 Hamza brand test clean first.
recent_events.mutation_status: No live Google Ads mutation. Targeting strategy guidance only.

recent_events.task: Shift late-night Hamza ad to craving-first hero
recent_events.summary: Updated the late-night Brand conveyance per Nihaf direction to personalize for late-night customer craving: pinned hero now starts with 'Hamza Ghee Rice & Kabab', second headline 'Try Hamza Express', third headline '10% Dine-In Tonight'. Description carries Wahi Hamza naam / naya zaiqa / open till 3 AM and Hamza Hotel search bridge. Verified all headline and description lengths within Google RSA limits. No live mutation.
recent_events.next_action: If approved, use this craving-first hero stack in landing and live RSA setup, with Hamza Hotel search bridge in description/landing subcopy.
recent_events.mutation_status: No live Google Ads mutation. Local docs/mockup only.

recent_events.task: Zoom-out macro objective for Hamza Hotel search ad headline
recent_events.summary: Paused live execution and reframed the campaign objective from copy tweaking to macro consumer psychology: intercept the exact Hamza Hotel search, reduce confusion about Hamza Express being the current HKP Road face, create a low-friction trial impulse, then convert to directions/dine-in using late-night hours and 10% offer. No live mutation.
recent_events.next_action: Finalize the 30-character headline stack around search mirroring + trial impulse + late-night reason before any landing/RSA mutation.
recent_events.mutation_status: No live Google Ads mutation. Strategy clarification only.

recent_events.task: Improve Hamza Hotel ad with conversion trial impulse
recent_events.summary: Reframed late-night Brand conveyance from generic curiosity to conversion-oriented trial impulse. New preferred visible copy: 'Searching Hamza Hotel? | Try Hamza Express' with description 'HKP Road's new Hamza face. Wahi Hamza naam. Ghee Rice & Kabab till 3 AM. 10% dine-in.' Verified Google headline/description character limits. Updated exact config, copy doc, and mockup. No live mutation.
recent_events.next_action: If approved, use this trial-impulse copy in landing and RSA pins, then apply full Google Ads setup via safe endpoint/UI readback.
recent_events.mutation_status: No live Google Ads mutation. Local docs/mockup only.

recent_events.task: Anchor Hamza Hotel ad copy on exact search action
recent_events.summary: Adjusted the late-night Brand copy to reflect the core intelligence that the person actively searched Hamza Hotel. Final frame now starts with 'Hamza Hotel Search Kiya?' then opens curiosity with 'Hamza Express: Naya Andaaz', followed by HKP Road/new Hamza face, Wahi Hamza naam, Open till 3 AM, and 10% dine-in. Updated config, copy doc, and mockup; removed blunt action wording.
recent_events.next_action: If approved, use this search-mirroring curiosity copy for landing/RSA pins before live campaign mutation.
